title: Fix logo not displaying in navbar and footer

requirements.text: Save the uploaded Growth Byte Digital logo image as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png (overwriting any existing file), then fix all components that reference this logo (Navbar.tsx, Footer.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, AboutSection.tsx) so the image renders correctly. Ensure the src attribute uses the correct relative public path '/assets/generated/logo.png', the alt attribute is set to 'Growth Byte Digital', the image has explicit height/width constraints appropriate for each context (height 48px in Navbar, height 60px in Footer, larger display size in HeroSection and AboutSection), and object-fit is set to 'contain' so the logo is never cropped or distorted.

quotes: logo is not showing fix it properly

acceptanceCriteria: The logo image file exists at frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png
The Growth Byte Digital logo is visible in the Navbar at approximately 48px height on both desktop and mobile
The logo is visible in the Footer alongside the agency name text
The logo is visible in the HeroSection
The logo is visible in the AboutSection with glow effect intact
No broken image icons appear anywhere on the page
The logo is not cropped or distorted — it uses object-fit contain

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/main.tsx
Do not alter existing contact details (phone: 6265381119, email: gbdigital@gmail.com)
nonGoals: Adding new sections or features beyond fixing logo display
Changing the color theme or layout
Modifying the contact form or WhatsApp button

edits: Re-export the logo with a transparent background and optimized for web use (WhatsApp Image 2026-02-15 at 12.15.01 AM.jpeg > logo.dim_512x512.png)
